description: Configures third-party integrations for Okta Identity Governance including ticketing systems (ServiceNow, Jira), messaging platforms (Slack, Teams) for interactive approvals, and SIEM forwarding for centralized audit logging. Most integrations use okta_event_hook for outbound events; full bidirectional sync requires Okta Workflows or the Governance API.
terraform_support_notes: Event hooks for Slack, Teams, and SIEM forwarding are fully supported via okta_event_hook. ServiceNow and Jira event hooks are supported for outbound events. Full bidirectional ticket sync (auto-create tickets, sync status) requires Okta Workflows connectors or OIG Governance API configuration. Interactive approval buttons in Slack/Teams require middleware or Okta Workflows.

risk_profile_effects.standard: No integrations enabled by default. All integrations are opt-in based on the client's tooling.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: No integrations enabled by default. All integrations are opt-in. Ticketing and messaging are environment-specific decisions, not risk-driven.
risk_profile_effects.strict: SIEM forwarding enabled by default (if endpoint provided). All other integrations opt-in. Strict environments are expected to have centralized audit logging.

risk_profile.label: Risk Profile
risk_profile.client_description: Only affects SIEM forwarding default (enabled at strict). Ticketing and messaging integrations are environment-specific and always opt-in.

enable_servicenow_integration.label: Enable ServiceNow Integration
enable_servicenow_integration.client_description: Forward governance events to ServiceNow for automatic ticket creation. Outbound event forwarding is immediate; bidirectional sync (ticket status back to OIG) requires additional Okta Workflows or ServiceNow IntegrationHub setup.

servicenow_instance_url.label: ServiceNow Instance URL
servicenow_instance_url.client_description: Your ServiceNow instance URL. Required if ServiceNow integration is enabled.

servicenow_api_credential.label: ServiceNow API Credential
servicenow_api_credential.client_description: API credential for ServiceNow ticket creation. Use a service account with incident creation permissions.

enable_jira_integration.label: Enable Jira Integration
enable_jira_integration.client_description: Forward governance events to Jira for automatic issue creation. Outbound forwarding is immediate; bidirectional sync requires Okta Workflows or Jira Automation.

jira_instance_url.label: Jira Instance URL
jira_instance_url.client_description: Your Jira Cloud instance URL. Required if Jira integration is enabled.

jira_api_token.label: Jira API Token
jira_api_token.client_description: API token for Jira issue creation. Use a service account with project write permissions.

enable_slack_approvals.label: Enable Slack Approvals
enable_slack_approvals.client_description: Send approval requests to Slack. Approvers receive notifications with request details. For interactive approve/deny buttons, configure Okta Workflows with the Slack connector.

enable_teams_approvals.label: Enable Teams Approvals
enable_teams_approvals.client_description: Send approval requests to Microsoft Teams. Approvers receive notifications with request details. For interactive approve/deny cards, configure Okta Workflows with the Teams connector or Power Automate.

slack_approval_webhook_url.label: Slack Approval Webhook URL
slack_approval_webhook_url.client_description: Slack incoming webhook URL for approval notifications. Required if Slack approvals are enabled.

teams_approval_webhook_url.label: Teams Approval Webhook URL
teams_approval_webhook_url.client_description: Microsoft Teams incoming webhook URL for approval notifications. Required if Teams approvals are enabled.

enable_siem_forwarding.label: Enable SIEM Forwarding
enable_siem_forwarding.client_description: Forward all governance events to a SIEM for centralized audit logging. Includes policy changes, access decisions, membership modifications, and lifecycle events. Enabled by default at strict tier.

siem_forwarding_endpoint.label: SIEM Forwarding Endpoint
siem_forwarding_endpoint.client_description: HTTPS endpoint for SIEM event forwarding. Required if SIEM forwarding is enabled.

outputs.servicenow_hook_id: ServiceNow hook ID. Null if not created.
outputs.jira_hook_id: Jira hook ID. Null if not created.
outputs.slack_approvals_hook_id: Slack approvals hook ID. Null if not created.
outputs.teams_approvals_hook_id: Teams approvals hook ID. Null if not created.
outputs.siem_forwarding_hook_id: SIEM forwarding hook ID. Null if not created.
